creator: joerg@FreeBSD.org
text:
*ping*

I'm still interested in a solution.

As it is, the installed bfd.h file is completely useless.

Resolving this bug is the prerequisite of finally dropping the devel/libbfd port, which in turn is required by devel/fnccheck and devel/fpc-bfd.

Without resolving this PR, these two ports are likely to be unusable as it turns out devel/binutils is now pretty ubiquitous on the average system, and it conflicts with devel/libbfd.
